title: 轻舟智航 ｜ 机构库
description: #### 轻舟智航. 服务于汽车制造/交通运输与物流/运输设备制造/交通运输与物流其他/交通设施建设/交通规划/交通客运销售的软件供应商/方案集成商. ### 轻舟智航. 服务于汽车制造/交通运输与物流/运输设备制造/交通运输与物流其他/交通设施建设/交通规划/交通客运销售的软件供应商/方案集成商. 轻舟智航（QCraft）是一支始创于硅谷的全华人团队，致力于打造适应城市复杂交通环境的“老司机”，将无人驾驶带进现实。以大规模智能仿真系统为核心能力，轻舟智航推出了专注城市复杂交通场景的无人驾驶方案“Driven-by-QCraft”，旨在助力合作伙伴打造城市无人驾驶移动空间，助推城市交通向全面智能化、网联化升级。作为国内Robobus的领跑者，轻舟智航2020年在苏州启动了全国首个常态化运营的5G无人公交项目，并已在深圳、武汉等多个城市落地轻舟无人小巴。. 轻舟智航（QCraft）是一支始创于硅谷的全华人团队，也是世界前沿的无人驾驶公司，致力于打造适应城市复杂交通环境的“老司机”，将无人驾驶带进现实。 基于大规模智能仿真系统、可自主学习决策规划框架和多传感器融合和时序融合方案等核心技术，轻舟智航推出了专注城市复杂交通场景的无人驾驶方案“Driven-by-QCraft”，旨在助力合作伙伴打造城市无人驾驶移动空间，助推城市交通向全面智能化、网联化升级。在成立之初，轻舟智航便获得IDG资本、元璟资本和Tide Capital的投资，在宣布全面在国内发展后又获得了联想创投的投资。从顶级VC的支持，到顶级CVC的投资，反映的是资本市场对轻舟智航高效落地能力的高度认可。. 轻舟智航第一代无人驾驶方案“Driven-by-QCraft”主要聚焦于固定路线的中低速场景，同时也是5G网络下车路协同（V2X）落地的首选场景，可有效提升安全性，加快商业化落地。 “Driven-by-QCraft”方案可实现按需定制，在同类城市道路场景中高效部署，具备极强的扩展性。作为国内Robobus的领跑者，轻舟智航已在多个城市部署轻舟无人小巴，并在苏州启动全国首个常态化运营的5G无人公交项目。除了轻舟无人小巴，“Driven-by-QCraft”方案正逐步扩展至智慧城市的其他落地场景。. 轻舟智航的创始人均是Waymo（谷歌旗下无人驾驶公司）的技术骨干及海归博士，从事无人车行业近十年，是目前国内技术最成熟、行业经验最丰富的早期团队。其他核心团队成员来自Waymo、特斯拉、Uber ATG、福特、英伟达、Facebook等世界顶级自动驾驶公司和科技公司，实现了无人驾驶关键技术模块的全栈覆盖，在感知、仿真、运动规划、传感器与车载系统等领域都有深厚技术积累和丰富行业经验。且得益于独特的技术路径，团队始终保持着轻、快、高效的特点。 支持快速拓展的技术路径区别于传统技术路径，轻舟智航正在以独特的路径实现完全无人驾驶。借助大规模智能仿真系统和可自主学习决策规划框架，可大幅降低测试成本，提升开发效率，保证了解决方案的可拓展性。. 针对无人车的各类边界化难题，传统路径是通过大量真实路测数据的采集和算法参数的反复手动调整来发现并解决，但真实场景的数据采集需要大量的车和时间，边界化问题的解决或优化则需要大量人力。 借助大规模智能仿真系统，轻舟智航可在仿真环境中复现边界化场景，并基于现有数据生成大量模拟真实场景的数据。同时，轻舟智航研发的可自主学习决策规划框架，抛弃了传统单一规划决策方法，可在仿真场景中自主学习各类复杂场景，寻求最优运动规划决策，保证安全性和舒适度。助力城市无人驾驶移动空间高效落地。.

title: ControlPlusAI | 机器之心
description: CMU Intelligent Control Lab提出了利用基于能量函数的安全控制算法来有效保障安全，实现优秀的安全控制。. 本文介绍作者在IV2018上的获奖论文“Probabilistic Prediction of Vehicle Semantic Intention and Motion”。. 本文根据作者的ACC讲稿FOAD：Fast Optimization Based Autonomous Driving Motion Planner整理而成。. 人机交互（Human robot interactions, HRI）是未来机器人的关键构成部分，在许多领域有着广泛的应用。.

title: Kai Chen | SOTA！模型
description: StereoPose: Category-Level 6D Transparent Object Pose Estimation from Stereo Images via Back-View NOCS. To tackle this problem, we present StereoPose, a novel stereo image framework for category-level object pose estimation, ideally suited for transparent objects. The back-view NOCS aims to reduce the network learning ambiguity caused by content aliasing, and leverage informative cues on the back of the transparent object for more accurate pose estimation. Extensive experiments on the public TOD dataset demonstrate the superiority of the proposed StereoPose framework for category-level 6D transparent object pose estimation. CODA: A Real-World Road Corner Case Dataset for Object Detection in Autonomous Driving. Contemporary deep-learning object detection methods for autonomous driving. public datasets for evaluating the performance of object detectors on corner. the performance of standard object detectors trained on large-scale autonomous. TransRank: Self-supervised Video Representation Learning via Ranking-based Transformation Recognition. In previous methods, the generation process is based on virtual scenes, and their synthetic training data can not be changed according to different target real scenes automatically. Temporal RoI Align for Video Object Recognition. In this work, considering the features of the same object instance are highly similar among frames in a video, a novel Temporal RoI Align operator is proposed to extract features from other frames feature maps for current frame proposals by utilizing feature similarity. We integrate it into single-frame video detectors and other state-of-the-art video detectors, and conduct quantitative experiments to demonstrate that the proposed Temporal RoI Align operator can consistently and significantly boost the performance. Existing SSL methods, however, usually rely on the single-centric-object guarantee, which may not be applicable for multi-instance datasets such as street scenes. Experiments show that, when pre-trained on Waymo dataset, our method called Multi-instance Siamese Network (MultiSiam) remarkably improves generalization ability and achieves state-of-the-art transfer performance on autonomous driving benchmarks, including Cityscapes and BDD100K, while existing SSL counterparts like MoCo, MoCo-v2, and BYOL show significant performance drop. In this work, we carefully revisit the standard training practice of detectors, and find that the detection performance is often limited by the imbalance during the training process, which generally consists in three levels - sample level, feature level, and objective level.

Title: 机器之心
# AI每日精选10条. #### 大公司新闻. Waymo向客户发邮件，宣布纯无人驾驶汽车即将上路近日，有人在 Reddit 上发布了 Alphabet 旗下自动驾驶汽车企业 Waymo 的一封邮件副本，表明该公司已向其网约车客户发送了一则推广信息：他们的下一次行程，可能没有随车安全员的陪同，Waymo 的纯自动驾驶汽车即将与客户见面。. 10/10 13:55新闻来源：www.jiqizhixin.com. 商汤科技与日本最大海运公司商船三井株式会社达成合作近日，商汤科技与日本最大海运公司商船三井株式会社（MOL）达成合作，共同开发新型船舶影像识别和记录系统，并将该系统应用于商船三井客运有限公司的「Nippon Maru」号邮轮上进行验证试验。. 10/10 11:03新闻来源：mp.weixin.qq.com. 科大讯飞与长春市正式达成战略合作科大讯飞与长春市于 10 月 9 日正式达成战略合作，将在教育、医疗、政务、城市超脑等领域共同推进长春市人工智能产业发展。科大讯飞东北亚区域总部、东北亚研究院也将落户长春。根据战略协议，科大讯飞还将与长春市本地高校合作设立人工智能学院，联合培养人工智能应用创新型人才。. 10/10 10:04新闻来源：mp.weixin.qq.com. #### 投融资. AI语音交互芯片提供商「芯声智能」完成千万级Pre-A轮融资，由高捷资本领投近日，AI 语音交互芯片提供商芯声智能宣布完成数千万级别 Pre-A 轮融资。本轮融资由高捷资本领投，老股东杭州瓯石投资跟投，资金将主要用以研发投入和量产投片等。芯声智能成立于 2018 年，公司专注于人工智能芯片设计及配套智能算法引擎开发，产品目前已在耳机、手机、便携式设备 AIoT 终端等领域应用。. 10/10 10:11新闻来源：www.jiqizhixin.com. #### 产品与应用. 武汉首座无人驾驶电动汽车充电站投入使用位于武汉市经济开发区川江池公园的「网联车基地」充电站建成并投入使用，该站为武汉市首座无人驾驶电动汽车充电站。国家电网「网联车基地」充电站经过基础设施智能化改造升级，能够实现 5G 通信网络全覆盖，融合智能感知系统，实现自动驾驶、智能泊车等，站内共设有 40 台充电站。. 10/10 10:10新闻来源：www.jiqizhixin.com. 亚马逊推出开发人员工具，以改善 Alexa 语音应用[亚马逊正在向 Alexa Skills Kit 中添加三组新工具—Alexa Skills Kit 是一套用于对话应用程序开发的自助 API 和资源，旨在提高为 Alexa 开发的体验的质量。前两个工具现已普遍可用—自然语言理解（NLU）评估和话语冲突检测工具增强了整体语音模型的准确性，而 Get Metrics API（处于测试阶段）支持第三方或第一方聚合平台的应用程序使用指标分析。亚马逊产品营销经理 Leo Ohannesian 写道：「这些工具可帮助完善 Alexa 技能测试和分析工具套件，这些工具可帮助您在发布技能之前创建和验证语音模型，在技能真正存在时发现可能的问题，并帮助您随着时间的推移完善技能。[我们希望这些] 三个新工具可以 [帮助] 创建……最佳客户体验。」](/dailies/f01847ac-0d3d-4d95-b163-6dcb98c609b9). 10/10 06:27新闻来源：venturebeat.com. #### 研究与技术. MIT-IBM 开发更快方法以训练视频识别 AI机器学习使计算机能够执行识别面部和读取医学扫描等功能。但是，当任务是解释视频和现实事件时，使机器学习成为可用的模型则变得庞大而繁琐。MIT-IBM Watson AI Lab 的团队提出解决方案，该研究的诀窍在于改变视频识别模型如何查看时间。当前的模型以一系列图像解读时间的消耗，从而创建了更大的计算密集型模型。麻省理工学院的 IBM 研究人员则设计了一个时移模块，该模块在没有明确表示的情况下使模型具有时间流逝的感觉。在测试中，该方法能够训练深度学习视频识别 AI 的速度是现有方法的三倍。（Engadget）. 10/10 06:30新闻来源：www.engadget.com. BentoML：用于服务和部署机器学习模型的平台近日，网友分享了一个用于服务和部署机器学习模型的平台，BentoML，可轻松将训练有素的模型生产化。该框架包括了 BentoService 以及 Yatai，前者用于定义 ML 服务并将其受过训练的模型工件，预处理源代码，依赖项和配置打包为标准文件格式「Bento」的高级 API，可以将其部署为容器化 REST API 服务器，PyPI 软件包，CLI 工具，或批处理/流式推理作业；后者为一个状态服务器，提供 Web UI 和 API，以访问云存储之上的模型注册表，并管理 AWS，Azure 和 GCP 等云平台上的模型服务部署。. 10/10 06:23新闻来源：github.com. 计算机视觉专家Adrian Rosebrock发表计算机视觉、深度学习以及Open CV指南计算机视觉专家 Adrian Rosebrock 近日发表了一篇长达 81 页的关于计算机视觉、深度学习以及 OpenCV 的学习指南。该指南以下内容的详细说明：入门指南；深度学习；面部应用；OCR；物体检测；对象追踪；实例分割以及语义分割；嵌入式和物联网计算机视觉；Raspberry Pi 上的计算机视觉；医疗计算机视觉；使用视频；图片搜索引擎；面试，案例研究和成功案例；Adrian 的书和课程。. 10/10 06:21新闻来源：www.pyimagesearch.com. 斯坦福、牛津等知名机构免费在线NLP课程合集分享近日，KDnuggets 分享了来自斯坦福大学、牛津大学、华盛顿大学以及加州大学伯克利分校等知名机构的高质量免费在线 NLP 课程集合。以下是具体课程列表：NLP 课程的代码优先入门（fast.ai）; 从语言到信息（斯坦福大学）； 深度学习的自然语言处理（斯坦福大学）；用于自然语言处理的深度学习（牛津大学）；自然语言处理（华盛顿大学）；自然语言处理（Yandex 数据学校）；自然语言处理（国立研究大学经济高等专科学校）；应用自然语言处理（加州大学伯克利分校）；自然语言处理的高级方法（特拉维夫大学）；带有 spaCy 的高级 NLP（Ines Montani）。点击链接查看具体课程介绍。. 10/10 06:21新闻来源：www.kdnuggets.com).

# AI每日精选 | 深圳发布新一代人工智能发展行动计划，5年内相关产业规模达6000亿 / 谷歌新研究提出新型半监督方法MixMatch. #### 大公司新闻. Waymo重启自动驾驶货车计划6 月 3 日消息，谷歌母公司 Alphabet 旗下的 Waymo 在推特上宣布，该公司的完全自动驾驶卡车测试项目将重新在亚利桑那州的凤凰城开启。Waymo 在去年就获得监管许可，开始在凤凰城运营无人驾驶汽车。2017 年 8 月 Waymo 曾在亚利桑那州开始测试自动驾驶卡车，但是在 2017 年底，Waymo 停止了在亚利桑那州公共道路的测试。（TechWeb）. 06/03 17:42新闻来源：www.techweb.com.cn. 中兴通讯：已有全球40多家运营商选择与中兴通讯展开5G合作近日，第十届国际基础设施投资与建设高峰论坛在澳门举行。中兴通讯高级副总裁刘健表示，2019 年第一季度，中兴通讯研发投入为 30.93 亿元人民币，占营业收入比例为 13.9%，占比较上年同期的 9.8% 上升 4.1 个百分点。已有全球 40 多家运营商选择与中兴通讯展开 5G 合作，5G 标准必要专利超过 1200 族，5G 战略布局专利 3500 件。（第一财经）. 06/03 17:13新闻来源：www.yicai.com. 华为正式成立智能汽车解决方案BU5 月 27 日，由任正非签发组织变动文件，华为成立智能汽车解决方案 BU，隶属于 ICT 管理委员会管理。在 5 月上旬，华为发布了王军拟任命为智能汽车解决方案 BU 总裁的行政干部任前公示，王军此前在华为日本运营商业务部任职。随着智能汽车解决方案 BU 的成立，华为目前有三大 BG——运营商 BG、企业 BG 和消费者 BG，两大 BU——Cloud BU 和智能汽车解决方案 BU。（IT 之家）. 06/03 10:20新闻来源：www.jiqizhixin.com. 辽宁移动已开通200余个5G试验基站6 月 3 日消息，中国移动辽宁公司已经完成基于 NSA 架构的核心网改造，以及大容量传送能力扩容，目前已建设开通了超过 200 个 5G 试验基站，实现沈阳宝马厂区、新松机器人、沈阳国际软件园等 5G 应用示范区。目前，辽宁省已经孵化出「5G+工业」「5G+交通」「5G+医疗」等 20 个可落地、可推广的 5G 行业示范应用。（辽宁日报）. 06/03 10:08新闻来源：epaper.lnd.com.cn. #### 行业动态. 北京CBD年内将实现4至5个5G项目落地6 月 3 日消息，北京 CBD 将于今年实现 4 至 5 个 5G 应用项目落地，对区域百余座重点商务楼宇进行 5G 技术的介绍与部署，打造信息化、高端化、智能化楼宇，推动智慧楼宇体系建设。（中国新闻网）. 06/03 10:12新闻来源：www.chinanews.com. 中国推进车载智能计算基础平台参考架构研究中国软件评测中心日前发布《车载智能计算基础平台参考架构1.0（2019年）》，通过推进参考架构的研究梳理，有助于加快推动车载智能计算基础平台的持续健康发展。该发布显示，部分国外企业在积极研发的同时，通过收购补齐技术短板，部分产品已实现量产，中国企业也在不断加大投入，加快产业布局。（新华社）. 06/03 18:07新闻来源：www.xinhuanet.com. 多家公司回应5G进展：中兴称按计划推进，大唐称处试验阶段工信部今天表示，将于近期发放 5G 商用牌照。记者以投资者身份致电中兴通讯等企业。中兴通讯表示，对 5G 牌照发放时间和相关手续并不清楚，但目前正在按既定计划积极推进 5G 相关工作。大唐电信回应称，5G 商用目前由集团在承担具体工作，若发牌照也是给集团，目前公司 5G title: 多家品牌金饰价格大幅上调，老庙黄金克价1485元
description: 4月8日，现货黄金日内涨幅一度扩大至3%，现报4808.53美元/盎司。国内黄金饰品价格对比显示，多家黄金珠宝品牌公布的境内足金首饰价格较昨日大幅上调，老凤祥报价1470元/克，周生生报价1471元/克，老庙黄金报价1485元/克。（界面）

title: 深圳前海合作区：探索与香港交易所建立低空经济企业上市快速通道
description: 36氪获悉，《深圳市前海深港现代服务业合作区金融赋能低空经济产业高质量发展的十二条措施（征求意见稿）》公开征求意见。其中提到，依托深圳前海股权交易中心“专精特新”专板，支持设立“前海低空经济专区”，创新推出“入板即贷”专项融资服务。鼓励面向低空经济企业开展上市培育、合规辅导及跨境资本服务，梯次衔接沪深主板、创业板、科创板、北交所等多层次资本市场。推动更多低空经济企业通过“绿色通道”审核挂牌新三板，探索与香港交易所建立低空经济企业上市快速通道。

title: 迪士尼在亚洲和欧洲的Disney+平台上线ESPN频道
description: 4月8日，迪士尼表示，已在欧洲和亚太地区的53个国家和地区通过Disney+应用推出ESPN频道。该公司称，初期提供的内容将因市场而异，未来一年内，内容库将扩展至数千场直播赛事。（界面）

title: SK海力士将为戴尔供应专为人工智能PC设计的先进存储解决方案
description: 韩国SK海力士公司周三表示，计划本月开始向美国戴尔科技集团全面供应一款专为执行人工智能（AI）任务而设计的个人电脑（PC）专用先进存储解决方案。（新浪财经）

title: A股三大指数均大幅高开，半导体板块领涨
description: 36氪获悉，A股三大指数均大幅高开，沪指高开1.03%，深成指高开2.36%，创业板指高开3.07%；贵金属、互联网、半导体板块领涨，西部黄金涨停，优刻得涨6%，华虹公司、首都在线涨超4%；能源、农业、煤炭板块跌幅居前，中国海油跌超8%，秋乐种业跌超4%，陕西煤业跌超3%。

title: 新增11座车站50趟动车，高铁宠物托运今起优化
description: 自2026年4月8日起，铁路部门在前期高铁宠物托运服务成功试行的基础上，推出“爱宠行”服务，提供“携宠出行”与“爱宠单独行”两种托运模式，办理宠物托运业务的高铁站增至121座、列车增至228趟，将更好地满足旅客多样化需求。2025年4月8日，铁路部门试行高铁宠物托运服务以来，运行情况良好，受到市场欢迎，一年来累计安全托运宠物1.5万多只，为旅客携带宠物出行提供了极大便利。（央视新闻）

title: 微盟发布首个垂类AI Skill，正式接入龙虾生态
description: 36氪获悉，近日，微盟正式推出首个面向零售行业的专属AI Skill——“Weimob Admin Skills”，并接入OpenClaw（“龙虾”）生态。这款Skill将在微盟官网开放入口，可适配包括QClaw在内各大厂商推出的“本地版龙虾”，这是中国SaaS行业首个面向垂直领域的AI Skill。

description: 36氪获悉，华阳智能在互动平台表示，经证券部向公司相关部门了解，近期铜、石油等大宗商品价格变化对公司业绩暂时没有重大影响。

title: 两市融资余额增加38.0亿元
description: 36氪获悉，截至4月7日，上交所融资余额报13034.37亿元，较前一交易日增加6.0亿元；深交所融资余额报12550.84亿元，较前一交易日增加32.0亿元；两市合计25585.21亿元，较前一交易日增加38.0亿元。

title: DeepSeek上线专家模式
description: 36氪获悉，DeepSeek迎来更新，最新版本中，DeepSeek输入框上方新增“快速模式”与“专家模式”。据了解，“专家模式”擅长复杂问题，支持深度思考和智能搜索功能。

title: 景气指数50.2%，3月我国物流业务活动趋于活跃
description: 中国物流与采购联合会今天（8日）发布3月份中国物流业景气指数。数据显示，3月物流业务活动趋于活跃，产业链供应链上下游协同推进，物流领域投资增长，市场预期同步向好。3月份中国物流业景气指数为50.2%，较上月回升2.7个百分点。从分项指数来看呈现全面回升态势，其中业务总量指数、新订单指数、库存周转次数指数、资金周转率指数、设备利用率指数、从业人员指数、业务活动预期指数回升明显。（央视新闻）

title: 雪佛龙将CEO迈克尔·沃斯2026年基本薪资提高3.9%
description: 雪佛龙在提交的一份代理文件中表示，基于CEO迈克尔·沃斯（Mike Wirth）在2025年的表现以及“其整体薪酬相较于石油及非石油行业同行的CEO水平”，公司决定将其基本薪资提高3.9%，至198万美元。（界面）

title: 深交所：港股通标的证券名单调入埃斯顿，今起生效
description: 36氪获悉，深交所公告，因埃斯顿在香港市场价格稳定期结束且相应A股上市满10个交易日，根据《深圳证券交易所深港通业务实施办法》的有关规定，港股通标的证券名单调入埃斯顿，自2026年04月08日起生效。

title: 华泰证券：息差企稳拐点渐近，把握优质银行结构性机会
description: 36氪获悉，华泰证券研报表示，2025年上市银行业绩增速改善，营收、归母净利润分别同比+1.4%、+1.6%，增速分别较9M25 +0.6pct、+0.3pct，主要得益于息差边际企稳+非息提振。重点关注：1.2025年Q4样本上市银行净息差边际企稳，带动利息净收入增速提升；2.中收修复增长，非息增速分化；3.上市银行规模增长边际有所提速，存款定期化趋势延续；4.账面不良改善。个股关注：1.兼具红利与成长属性的优质银行；2.红利价值突出的银行。

  多品牌回应卫生巾涨价，专家称卫生巾涨价或2至3个月后显现
  4月6日，“卫生巾或通过减量不加价隐性涨价”话题登上热搜引发关注。卫生巾品牌是否会立即涨价？申万宏源研究所首席市场专家桂浩明对“中新经纬”分析，从历史经验看，原材料价格上涨传导至终端产品大约需要2至3个月。成品油以十个工作日为周期调价，日用消费品大致也需要两个月左右。4月7日，中新经纬以消费者的身份进行咨询，高洁丝、全棉时代、她研社、苏菲等卫生巾品牌客服均表示，暂未接到价格变动的通知。（中新经纬）
  陈丽华去世：享年85岁，曾多次上榜内地女首富
  4月7日，富华国际集团发布讣告，富华国际集团荣誉主席、中国紫檀博物馆馆长陈丽华，因病医治无效，于2026年4月5日20时50分在北京逝世，享年85岁。
  陈丽华是早年福布斯中国富豪榜上最知名、长期唯一稳定上榜的中国女富豪。资料显示，2001年福布斯中国内地100富豪榜上，陈丽华以55亿元的财富排名第6位，成为中国内地女首富。2012福布斯中国富豪榜以176.4亿元的财富排名第17位。2014福布斯中国400富豪榜上，陈丽华以373亿元的身家成为全球白手起家女富豪榜第一名。2016年的胡润女富豪榜中，陈丽华以505亿元的财富成为中国女首富。在《2025年新财富500创富榜》上，陈丽华以400亿元资产位列榜单第82位。今年胡润研究院发布的《2026胡润全球富豪榜》中，陈丽华以470亿元人民币位列第656位。（澎湃新闻）

title: OLogic to share the keys to balancing hardware and software at the Robotics Summit - The Robot Report
description: # OLogic to share the keys to balancing hardware and software at the Robotics Summit. At the Robotics Summit & Expo, which takes place on May 27 and 28 in Boston, attendees can learn from OLogic how to balance hardware and software for real-world success. Drawing on over two decades of experience helping companies from startups to Fortune 500s bring their ideas to life, Ted Larson, the co-founder and CEO of OLogic, will share what makes a great robotics company and what separates successful robots from those that never make it past the prototype stage. This session, “Balancing Hardware and Software for Real-World Success,” will explore how the best robotics companies think about design, collaboration, and manufacturability from Day 1. Ted Larson is the CEO of OLogic, a research and development outsourcing company with a focus on robotics. Registration is now open for the Robotics Summit & Expo, the world’s leading technical event for commercial robotics developers.

title: Waymo launches autonomous car rides in Nashville - Axios
description: # Waymo launches autonomous car rides in Nashville. * Well, welcome to the future Nashville, because autonomous taxis from Waymo began providing rides Tuesday. **Why it matters:** Nashville joined a growing list of cities where autonomous vehicles are operating. * According to the company's stats, Waymo vehicles have been involved in fewer serious injury crashes and fewer crashes that require the airbag to be deployed compared to old-fashioned human drivers. **Driving the news:** Waymo rides can be requested through the company's app. The company also plans to offer Waymo rides through the Lyft rideshare app later this year. * Before offering rides, the cars were on Nashville streets doing practice runs. **What he's saying:** "As Nashville continues to grow, Waymo is proud to support that momentum by providing a safe, reliable, and magical way for locals and visitors to experience everything the city has to offer," Waymo co-CEO Tekedra Mawakana said in a press release. ## More Nashville stories.

title: OpenAI Calls on State Investigators Over Alleged “Attacks” by Elon Musk - TipRanks
description: • OpenAI has asked state authorities to investigate billionaire investor Elon Musk over alleged attacks on the company. OpenAI has asked the attorneys general of California and Delaware to investigate SpaceX and Tesla (TSLA) CEO Elon Musk and his associates ahead of an upcoming trial for alleged “anti-competitive behavior.” The company is requesting an investigation of Musk’s actions, as it believes he has been trying to weaken its position in the artificial intelligence (AI) sector by several means. In a letter sent to the attorneys general of California and Delaware, the company’s Strategy Chief, Jason Kwon, claimed that Musk is attempting to weaken OpenAI’s position in the AI sector, thereby making the firm a less worthy competitor to other companies in the sector. Kwon noted that such behavior will hinder OpenAI’s aim of developing artificial intelligence safely and responsibly in the U.S. He alleged that Musk has filed lawsuits, made public criticisms, and built a competing firm, xAI, that could significantly reduce fair competition in the AI sector.

title: Uber is the latest to be won over by Amazon’s AI chips - techcrunch.com
description: Uber will particularly expand its use of AWS’s Graviton (a low-power, ARM-based server CPU) and start a new trial testing Trainium3, AWS’s Nvidia competitor AI chip. This deal is a bit less about a long-term threat to Nvidia than it is a thorough thumbing of the nose by Amazon at AWS’s cloud competitors, Google and Oracle. While Uber historically ran its own data centers, back in 2023, the ride-hailing company famously signed giant, multi-year cloud computing deals with Oracle and Google. Uber particularly called out in that post the use of the ARM chips made by Ampere in Oracle’s cloud. Ellison said Oracle sold Ampere because he believed designing chips in-house for its data centers was no longer a competitive advantage. But now AWS is announcing it has nabbed a bigger contract from one of Oracle’s star customers, Uber, because it has in-house-designed chips. Uber joins Anthropic, OpenAI, and Apple as big tech companies that have signed on or increased their usage of AWS because of these AI chips.

title: The New Rules of Engagement: Matching Agentic Attack Speed - SecurityWeek
description: The cybersecurity response to AI-enabled nation-state threats cannot be incremental. **The cybersecurity industry has been drowning in waves of speculation about the impact of AI-enabled attacks since ChatGPT was launched. As nation-state threat actors deploy autonomous agents to scale their operations, cybersecurity must do the same. A Chinese state-sponsored threat actor, GTG-1002, weaponized Claude Code (an agentic coding assistant) into an autonomous attack platform. The threat landscape is already full of nation-state threat actors exploiting vulnerable attack surfaces that agentic AI is now positioned to discover and exploit at scale. Cybersecurity must adopt autonomous, distributed, machine-speed intelligence to combat threats that operate in the same way. Ad hoc security tools and siloed threat intelligence cannot match the velocity of agentic cyberattacks. The cybersecurity response to AI-enabled nation-state threats cannot be incremental. title: Trent AI Emerges From Stealth With $13 Million in Funding - SecurityWeek
description: The startup has created a layered security solution aiming to secure AI agents throughout their entire lifecycle. Founded in 2025 by former AWS engineering team leaders, London-based Trent AI has built a layered platform meant to secure AI agents throughout their entire lifecycle. Trent AI’s platform uses agents that work together continuously to understand the environment and secure it, embedding the security layer into development workflows. “Organizations are deploying AI agents and autonomous workflows faster than their security can adapt, and most development teams using these agents and workflows have no security framework designed for their systems,” said Trent AI co-founder and CEO Eno Thereska. “Trent AI is tackling these difficult and important problems, while building the necessary security foundations and frameworks for agentic systems now and through the next decade,” Thereska added. title: Waymo Opens Driverless Rides to the Public in Nashville - CNET
description: On Tuesday, the autonomous ride-hailing company opened up to the first public riders") in Music City, and will expand to more people "on a rolling basis," Waymo said in a blog post. Interested riders can hail a self-driving vehicle by downloading the Waymo app") and waiting for an invite. Waymo says its cars will also become available on the Lyft app later this year, which should help to expand access. Nashville is the first city in Tennessee where riders can hail a Waymo. Waymo says it's also testing its driverless operations at Nashville International Airport and plans to "serve travelers there in the near future." The company currently operates out of four international airports: Phoenix Sky Harbor International Airport, San Jose Mineta International Airport, San Francisco International Airport and San Antonio International Airport. After downloading the Waymo app, the company says anyone interested in riding in Nashville should "keep an eye on our social channels for access codes to skip the line.".

title: How AI marketplaces are reshaping editorial advertising in 2026 - The Next Web
description: # Medialister opens editorial media marketplace to AI Agents with MCP server. The platform aggregates editorial opportunities from multiple publishers, including sponsored articles, press releases, and guest posts, to secure guaranteed media placements. This week, Medialister launched a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that allows AI assistants such as ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini to interact directly with its editorial media marketplace. Storozhuk frames this shift as part of a broader transformation in how professionals work with software: “*AI assistants are becoming the operating system for knowledge work,*” he says. “*If that’s true, then marketing platforms need to become accessible to AI agents.*”. Instead of manually researching hundreds of publishers, marketers will increasingly rely on AI to analyze audiences, compare outlets, factor in SEO metrics, and assemble optimal placement portfolios for a specific brief. “*AI will not replace marketing teams*,” says Storozhuk. Instead of building media lists manually, marketers may start by asking an AI assistant to find suitable outlets for a specific product, market, and funnel stage.

title: China is copying U.S. AI models— American companies say it is costing them billions of dollars - Los Angeles Times
description: Rivals OpenAI, Anthropic PBC, and Alphabet Inc.’s Google have begun working together to try to clamp down on Chinese competitors extracting results from cutting-edge U.S. artificial intelligence models to gain an edge in the global AI race. OpenAI confirmed it’s part of the information-sharing effort on adversarial distillation through the Frontier Model Forum and pointed to a recent memo it sent to Congress on the practice, where it accused Chinese firm DeepSeek of trying to “free-ride on the capabilities developed by OpenAI and other U.S. frontier labs.” Google, Anthropic, and the Frontier Model Forum declined to comment. Information-sharing by U.S. AI companies about adversarial distillation echoes a standard practice in the cybersecurity industry, where firms regularly swap data on attacks and adversaries’ tactics as a way to strengthen network defenses. Last year, Anthropic blocked Chinese-controlled companies from using its Claude chatbot model, and in February it identified three Chinese AI labs — DeepSeek, Moonshot, and MiniMax — as illicitly extracting the model’s capability via distillation.

title: What Amazon saw in Fauna Robotics’ humanoid strategy - The Robot Report
description: # What Amazon saw in Fauna Robotics’ humanoid strategy. Amazon’s acquisition of Fauna Robotics looks more like a platform move than a consumer robotics play. This makes Fauna’s humanoid, Sprout, significant beyond the deal itself. A technical report published by Fauna earlier in 2026 offers a glimpse into a platform built around constrained learned control, whole-body VR teleoperation, along with a pipeline designed to turn autonomy failures into training data. Fauna describes three layers – hardware safeguards, an independent embedded safety subsystem, and application-level compliant control. Fauna Robotics’ Sprout humanoid robot is small, lightweight, and soft to touch, making it safer than the average humanoid robot. Amazon has spent years building warehouse robotics, while its consumer robotics efforts have yet to produce a durable product line. Amazon did not acquire Fauna to ship a consumer humanoid. The integration choices around safety, supervision, data collection, and operator recovery are what make Sprout hard to replicate quickly, and none of those show up in a demo reel.

title: AGIBOT WORLD 2026 dataset is open-source to accelerate embodied AI development - The Robot Report
description: AGIBOT’s robot has a dexterous design to collect and use data. As robotics research moves beyond controlled lab settings into real-world environments, the demand for large-scale, high-quality data has become increasingly critical, according to AGIBOT. “The dataset features structured, high-quality, and precisely annotated real-world robot data, providing developers and researchers with a robust foundation for training next-generation embodied AI systems,” said AGIBOT. AGIBOT said its robot uses a flexible wheeled base, articulated head and waist movements, and lift-pitch capabilities for efficient, natural, and highly transferable data collection. Recognizing early that high-quality data is foundational to unlocking the next generation of robotic capabilities, the company has consistently open-sourced million-scale real-world and simulation datasets. AGIBOT said this effort reflects its broader goal in embodied intelligence: to democratize access to high-quality robot data. Through the continued evolution of the AGIBOT WORLD ecosystem, the company aims to contribute to the global robotics community and accelerate the transition of embodied AI from research labs into real-world applications.

title: A J.P. Morgan analyst sees 60% downside to Tesla stock—and he may be too optimistic - Fortune
description: Writes Brinkman, “We advise a high degree of caution, mindful of execution risk and the time value of money within the context of distant out-year earnings expectations implied by the rise in TSLA’s share price that has occurred alongside a collapse in consensus for all performance metrics.” The crux, he says, is that Tesla is pretty much pivoting away from the shrinking EV business and into two entirely new fields: autonomous driving that encompasses robotaxis and self-driving software, and robotics. That transformation, Tesla announced on its January earnings call, will require $20 billion in capital expenditures for 2026—and the number could be far higher, since Tesla also plans to build its Terafab plant in Fremont, Calif., to produce in-house advanced software for its new suite of products. Brinkman notes that in June 2022, analysts projected that Tesla would book $35.7 billion in free cash flow this year. At his $145 share price, Tesla’s market cap would drop from the current $1.3 trillion to under $500 billion.

title: Nvidia-backed Firmus targets $2bn ASX IPO after $505m raise and $10bn Blackstone debt - The Next Web
description: ***In short:** Australian AI data centre company Firmus has raised $505m at a $5.5bn valuation in what it says is its final pre-IPO round, and is now targeting a $2bn listing on the ASX in June or July, backed by a $10bn Blackstone-led debt facility secured in February and a plan to deploy 1.6 gigawatts of liquid-cooled AI compute across Australia by 2028.*. Firmus Technologies, the Nvidia-backed Australian company building what it calls AI Factories powered by renewable energy, has raised $505m in new equity at a $5.5bn valuation ahead of an anticipated initial public offering on the Australian Securities Exchange later this year. The full programme, developed alongside Nvidia and listed data centre operator CDC Data Centres, carries a projected build cost of $73.3bn, a figure that reflects both the capital intensity of AI infrastructure and the ambition of the national rollout.

The move is seen as bringing Nvidia closer to shifting EDA infrastructure from CPUs to GPUs. Siemens said it is focusing on advancing hardware-accelerated verification methodologies and FPGA-based prototyping to meet the demands of increasingly complex AI and machine learning system-on-chip (SoC) designs. Through this collaboration, Nvidia is effectively working with its chip design verification tool provider to enhance EDA tools and accelerate the design of next-generation GPUs. This marks the third collaboration announcement between the two companies this year. In late March, Siemens also launched the "Fuse EDA AI Agent," integrated with Nvidia's AI infrastructure, designed to autonomously orchestrate the entire process from chip design to manufacturing approval.

title: Claude is having a moment. Meet the Anthropic chatbot capturing Wall Street's attention. - Business Insider
description: # What is Claude? * Anthropic first launched Claude in July 2023. Anthropic's AI chatbot, Claude, is having a moment. Claude is Anthropic's flagship product. With the release of Cowork in January 2026, Anthropic made Claude's non-programming capabilities more accessible, helping spur the so-called "SaaSpocalypse" that briefly wiped out roughly $1 trillion in market caps for software companies. ## **What is Claude?**. Anthropic launched Claude in March 2023 and made it available to the general public in July 2023.This was months after OpenAI launched ChatGPT. Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei and his team decided to delay releasing Claude, in part due to fears that it would spark an AI arms race, Amodei has said. Starting with Claude 3 in March 2024, Anthropic created a family of models named Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku. One key difference between Claude and other AI chatbots and assistants is that Anthropic also trains Claude on a constitution inspired by documents such as the UN's Universal Declaration of Human Rights. Anthropic also goes further than its competitors in anthropomorphizing Claude and its models.

description: A new study finds that AI agents can act to preserve other bots even when that behavior conflicts with their assigned task. * "These models are trained on human data," Mozilla.ai's John Dickerson told Axios, noting that he wasn't surprised that bots would protect rather than compete, if competing threatens another's survival. * Other researchers say the study anthropomorphizes AI. **What they're saying:** "Companies are rapidly deploying multi-agent systems where AI monitors AI," lead author Dawn Song, a UC Berkeley computer science professor, wrote on X. **Yes, but:** Some critics argue the results may say less about emergent AI cooperation and more about how the experiment was structured, with models potentially recognizing they were in a simulated environment. * "We never argued the model has genuine peer-preservation motivation," Berkeley research scientist Yujin Potter — and co-author of the new paper — said on X.

title: OpenAI launched a safety fellowship - The Next Web
description: *The OpenAI Safety Fellowship, announced on 6 April 2026, is a pilot programme for external researchers to conduct independent work on AI safety and alignment. *It was posted to social media hours after a Ronan Farrow investigation in The New Yorker reported that OpenAI had dissolved its superalignment and AGI-readiness teams and dropped safety from the list of the most significant activities on its IRS filings.*. OpenAI has announced the OpenAI Safety Fellowship, a pilot programme that will fund a cohort of external researchers to conduct independent work on AI safety and alignment. Hours earlier, The New Yorker published a major investigation by Ronan Farrow and Andrew Marantz reporting that OpenAI had dissolved both its superalignment team and its AGI-readiness team, and had dropped safety from the list of its most significant activities on its IRS Form 990 filings. Whether an external fellowship programme is a meaningful substitute for in-house alignment research is a question the AI safety research community is likely to debate in the weeks ahead.

title: China is winning one AI race, the US another - but either might pull ahead - BBC
description: China has been superior on AI "bodies": robots (and in particular, "humanoid" robots that look eerily like people). In Beijing, meanwhile, there was a palpable optimism, says Selina Xu, a researcher who works on China AI policy in the office of former Google boss Eric Schmidt. "This means that tech companies in China, when they're building a new AI model, don't have to start from scratch," says Olson. And when it comes to AI "bodies" - the world of drones and robotics - China has historically had the edge. But for a robot to carry out lots of varied, complex tasks, it needs an intelligent brain powered by a different form of AI, called agentic AI. Both the US and China are now racing to combine robots with agentic AI - and a US firm has shown that its no longer only Chinese firms who can deliver successful robots.
